prompt:
A cinematic, high-fashion portrait of a young woman gazing slightly upward with a contemplative expression. The composition blends fine art and multimedia collage—her face subtly layered with delicate architectural blueprints, geometric grids, and technical schematics. The edges dissolve into an expressive burst of charcoal and white paint splashes, creating a deconstructed, artistic frame.

Hyper-realistic orange autumn maple leaves float gently around her hair and neck, adding motion and contrast. She wears a thick, textured brown knit scarf. Lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, with ultra-sharp focus on the eyes and finely detailed, lifelike skin textures. The color palette leans toward muted earth tones, accented by vibrant orange highlights. Shot in an editorial photography style, 8K resolution, crisp and highly detailed.
